svg.title: Face Detection and Notification System Diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing camera input, OpenCV processing, face matching, and Twilio SMS alert output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the webcam capture frames in OpenCV?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenCV Haar Cascade detect faces?')
sendPrompt('How does template matching compare faces?')
sendPrompt('How do I add faces to the known faces folder?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an unknown face is detected?')
sendPrompt('How does Twilio send SMS alerts in Python?')
sendPrompt('What information is in the SMS alert message?')

svg.text: Real-Time Face Detection and Notification System — Architecture
